child.code:
Inheritance and authority — what parent provides, what each sub owns:

Field                                             Parent  Sub     Notes
-----                                             ------  ---     -----
metadata.layoutFile                               ✓       –       sub does NOT redeclare it
metadata.platforms                                ✓       –       sub inherits platform list
dataFlow.customTypes                              ✓       +       sub can ADD types; name clashes are errors
structure.components / structure.layout           ✓       –       auto-imported from parent's Layout JSON
stateManagement.uiVariables                       –       ✓       each sub declares its own slice
stateManagement.eventHandlers                     –       ✓       each sub owns its handlers
stateManagement.displayLogic                      –       ✓       each sub wires its own element ids
dataFlow.viewModel.methods + vars                 –       ✓       each sub's ViewModel is its own class
userActions / transitions / relatedFiles / notes  –       ✓       per-sub; nothing is merged

Validator rule (validator.py:_parent_spec_has_layout_file): a sub-spec may
omit structure.components when its parentSpec declares a layoutFile — the
standalone validator tolerates the gap.
